mnemonics: SPEED: Sparse data, Precision/Recall, Evaluation metrics, Efficiency, Duplicate detection
keyPoints: The core challenge is efficiently retrieving relevant documents from a massive, sparse collection.
Evaluation relies on metrics like Precision, Recall, and F-measure to quantify effectiveness.
Implementation involves trade-offs between computational efficiency and retrieval quality.
commonMistakes: Optimizing only for speed while ignoring recall, leading to missed relevant documents.
Using evaluation metrics on the training data instead of a separate test set, causing overfitting.
